title: CornCob's Lively Modpack
description: This is all about Quality of Life Features while keeping your Minecraft Client as optimized as it can be!
body:
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/gK9c3X5.png)
## 📝 Info - [**Socials**](https://connorcorn.carrd.co)
- [**Donations**](https://www.patreon.com/connorcorn07)
- [**My Other Modpacks**](https://modrinth.com/user/Connorcrafts21)
- [**Izen's Stuff**](https://modrinth.com/user/MaybeIzen) - [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/xFRzWBAfQh)
## 📜 Description The CornCob's Lively Modpack aims to keep the quality of Minecraft while boosting FPS. We also throw in a couple of QOL mods to keep your gaming experience one of the best! We include some performance shaders, cool texture packs, and other things to make sure your game is the most spiffed out of all of your friends. ## 🔃 Mod Loader Currently, we can only use Fabric as one of our mods is incompatible with Quilt. We will attempt to create a Quilt version in the future, but it is not likely at this time. ## 📦 What's Inside? Below each release, we list the mods included in the modpack. We carefully select each mod to optimize performance while providing the best visual and functional experience.
